name: componentry-bouncy-accordion
title: Bouncy Accordion
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Expands one accessible row while neighboring rows join and separate with connected spring motion.

changes: Repointed copied helpers, added a visible focus ring, made collapsed content inert, and repaired exact-optional typing for controlled inputs and optional class maps.
Kept only the easing token used by the retained accordion component.

modifications.change: Repointed copied helpers, added a visible focus ring, made collapsed content inert, and repaired exact-optional typing for controlled inputs and optional class maps.
modifications.reason: Keep the upstream connected-row motion while preventing hidden controls from receiving focus.

modifications.change: Kept only the easing token used by the retained accordion component.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied dependency closure limited to the token this component actually imports.
